books.title: Washington Square
books.author: Henry James
books.summary: A young woman is courted by a man her father disapproves of.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: Pointed Roofs
books.author: Dorothy M. Richardson
books.summary: Seventeen-year-old Miriam Henderson is sent to Germany to teach English at a finishing school in Hanover.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: The Bungalow Mystery
books.author: Carolyn Keene
books.summary: A young amateur detective investigates a new friend’s abusive guardian.

books.title: Psmith, Journalist
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: Psmith, visiting New York with Mike on a cricket tour, finds entertainment and trouble for himself in the newspaper business, stirring up trouble with New York’s notorious gangs.

books.title: The Second Mrs. Tanqueray
books.author: Arthur W. Pinero
books.summary: A gentleman remarries a woman of questionable character and tries to redeem her, but her past revisits the family in unexpected and tragic ways.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: R. A. Lafferty
books.summary: A collection of science fiction and fantasy stories by R. A. Lafferty ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Seven Dials Mystery
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: A weekend party at a country mansion ends in murder, and the daughter of the lord of the estate joins Superintendent Battle in investigating.

books.title: Ghost Stories
books.author: E. F. Benson
books.summary: A collection of ghost stories by E. F. Benson.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: Unnatural Death
books.author: Dorothy L. Sayers
books.summary: An amateur detective’s investigation of the suspiciously-early death of an elderly lady triggers a series of deadly events.

books.title: On the Art of Reading
books.author: Arthur Quiller-Couch
books.summary: Quiller-Couch argues for the study and appreciation of classic English literature.

books.title: Mutual Aid
books.author: Peter Kropotkin
books.summary: Kropotkin explores the role of cooperation in animal societies and human societies, past and present, and how it could benefit modern society.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Langston Hughes
books.summary: A collection of poems by Langston Hughes.

books.title: The Coming of Bill
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A domineering author of books on eugenics and hygiene makes a match between her niece and an idle artist, intending them to raise a son according to her principles, regardless of the consequences.

books.title: The Stainless Steel Rat
books.author: Harry Harrison
books.summary: An intergalactic thief tries life on the side of the law.

books.title: Ukridge Stories
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A collection of stories featuring P. G. Wodehouse’s charismatic character Stanley Featherstonehaugh Ukridge.

books.title: An Inquiry Into the Accordancy of War with the Principles of Christianity
books.author: Jonathan Dymond
books.summary: Dymond argues that war is incompatible with the teachings of Christianity.

books.title: The Path to Rome
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc takes a walking pilgrimage to Rome from his hometown in France, writing of the journey, sketching the sights, and digressing on a wide variety of subjects.
